title: Ultra Dental Floss Sticks with Non-Slip Pick - Assorted Designs, Unmatched Teeth Cleaning & Comfort - Perfect for Daily Use & Travel - 50 Pcs
features: 2 ASSORTED DESIGNS FOR UNMATCHED STYLE: Choose from two unique designs to add a touch of personal flair to your dental care kit, ensuring you never have to sacrifice style for function when maintaining your oral hygiene.

SUPERIOR DURABILITY: Constructed with high-quality materials, these dental floss sticks are built to last, providing you with consistent performance and unmatched longevity for a worry-free dental care experience.

EFFORTLESS AND EASY TO USE: The Ultra Dental Floss Sticks are designed for user convenience; their non-slip pick guarantees an efficient, hassle-free dental cleaning experience every time, even for those hard-to-reach areas.

IDEAL FOR DAILY USE AND TRAVEL: The compact, lightweight design of these floss sticks makes them perfect for on-the-go use, ensuring you always have a reliable dental care solution at your fingertips, whether at home or travelling.

BOOST YOUR ORAL HEALTH: Experience exceptional teeth cleaning and comfort with these premium floss sticks, promoting gum health, preventing plaque buildup, and ensuring a confident smile, all while being gentle on your teeth and gums.
description: Introducing ultra dental floss sticks with non-slip pick - your ultimate tool for an unmatched teeth cleaning experience. These handy sticks come in an array of assorted designs, offering not just functionality but aesthetics too. Each stick features a non-slip pick, ensuring a firm grip during use for optimum control. Our ultra dental floss sticks are crafted to deliver a superior cleaning, reaching even the hardest-to-access areas in your mouth. They promise exceptional comfort, making your daily oral care routine a breeze. Ideal for on-the-go use or travel, this pack contains 50 pieces. So, never compromise on your oral hygiene, no matter where you are.
